sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103912" key="tiqa/seuma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τῐθᾰ´σ-ευμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n103912.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">device for taming</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:1:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.9</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
